response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep technical versatility, and demonstrable leadership in open-source and cross-functional projects, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade GenAI or cloud-based AI systems, with minimal mention of vector databases, RAG, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph despite claiming AI-agent infrastructure work.
strengths: Proven full-stack expertise with TypeScript/Node.js and cloud tools (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership via GISCollective and developer tooling
Demonstrated ability to lead technical workshops and mentor teams across diverse domains
concerns: No explicit evidence of 8+ years building production GenAI systems or RAG architectures
Vector databases and multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI) are not mentioned or demonstrated
AI experience is vaguely framed as 'contributing to AI-agent infrastructure' without depth or metrics
